title: androsace villosa subsp. koso-poljanskii
intro: Androsace villosa subsp. koso-poljanskii, also known as a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the Primulaceae family, is a type of alpine plant native to the Western Caucasus region. The medicinal properties of Androsace villosa subsp. koso-poljanskii include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce swelling and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of this plant are associated with its ability to alleviate symptoms of coughs and respiratory issues, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Androsace villosa subsp. koso-poljanskii is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal purposes, and its extracts are sometimes used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
